'''kapofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kwashiorkor|kwashiorkor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kwashiorkor|kwashiorkor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kapofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæpefeth|kæpefeth]] || [[word:kæpefej|kæpefej]] || [[word:kæpefesh|kæpefesh]] || [[word:kæpefe|kæpefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kapopofoth|kapopofoth]] || [[word:kapopofoj|kapopofoj]] || [[word:kapopofosh|kapopofosh]] || [[word:kapopofo|kapopofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kapofoth|kapofoth]] || [[word:kapofoj|kapofoj]] || [[word:kapofosh|kapofosh]] || [[word:kapofo|kapofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kapoffoth|kapoffoth]] || [[word:kapoffoj|kapoffoj]] || [[word:kapoffosh|kapoffosh]] || [[word:kapoffof|kapoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kapofotho|kapofotho]] || [[word:kapofojo|kapofojo]] || [[word:kapofosho|kapofosho]] || [[word:kapofoko|kapofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kapofoth|kapofoth]] || [[word:kapofoj|kapofoj]] || [[word:kapofosh|kapofosh]] || [[word:kapofo|kapofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kapofothol|kapofothol]] || [[word:kapofojol|kapofojol]] || [[word:kapofoshol|kapofoshol]] || [[word:kapofokol|kapofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kapofothotho|kapofothotho]] || [[word:kapofojojo|kapofojojo]] || [[word:kapofoshosho|kapofoshosho]] || [[word:kapofoko|kapofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kapofothon|kapofothon]] || [[word:kapofojon|kapofojon]] || [[word:kapofoshon|kapofoshon]] || [[word:kapofokon|kapofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kapofothoro|kapofothoro]] || [[word:kapofojoro|kapofojoro]] || [[word:kapofoshoro|kapofoshoro]] || [[word:kapofokoro|kapofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
